headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 12, 2026**
article:
The Los Angeles Angels suffered a 7-2 loss to the Cleveland Guardians, with Travis Bazzana leading the Angels' offense. The New York Yankees fell short in Baltimore, with Coby Mayo hitting a crucial home run for the Orioles. The Tampa Bay Rays secured an 8-5 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Andrés Giménez leading the offense.

Injuries and availability are impacting several teams. José Caballero has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right middle finger fracture. Sean Murphy is on the 10-day injured list retroactive to May 11 with a fractured left middle finger. Addison Barger is on the 10-day injured list retroactive to May 10 with right elbow inflammation. Eli White is on the 7-day injured list with a concussion. Justin Verlander has been transferred to the 60-day injured list with left hip inflammation. Kerry Carpenter is on the 10-day injured list with a left AC Joint Sprain.

Several trades and roster movements have taken place. The Arizona Diamondbacks acquired outfielder Jose Requena in a trade with the Los Angeles Dodgers. The Diamondbacks sent center fielder Alek Thomas to the Dodgers in exchange for Requena. The San Francisco Giants traded catcher Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for left-hander Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles acquired right-hander Enyel Garcia and right-hander Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall to Guardians in 7-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels suffered a 7-2 defeat at the hands of the Cleveland Guardians. Travis Bazzana led the Angels' offense with 1 hit and 2 RBIs in 2 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall Short in Baltimore**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dropped a 2-3 decision to the Baltimore Orioles, with Coby Mayo leading the Orioles' offense. Mayo hit a crucial home run, driving in three runs.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Blue Jays 8-5**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured an 8-5 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Andrés Giménez leading the offense with 2 home runs and 5 RBIs. Bryan Baker earned the save in relief, striking out 2 batters in a scoreless inning.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Shut Out Rangers 1-0**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a narrow 1-0 victory over the Texas Rangers, with Michael Soroka earning the win after 6.1 innings of scoreless relief. Geraldo Perdomo led the Diamondbacks' offense with a 2-hit performance, including a crucial double that plated the game's only run.

top_news.title: **Yankees Place José Caballero on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: New York Yankees shortstop José Caballero has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right middle finger fracture. The injury occurred on an unspecified date.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Acquire Requena in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks have acquired outfielder Jose Requena in a trade with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Requena joins the Diamondbacks in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas.
